mcqs.question: What does the wait3() function do?

options.text: A. Waits for a child process to terminate
B. Waits for a parent process to terminate
C. Waits for a sibling process to terminate
D. Waits for a grandchild process to terminate

mcqs.explanation: The wait3() function suspends execution of the calling process until one of its children terminates.

mcqs.question: What is the return value of the wait3() function?

options.text: A. The process ID of the terminated child process
B. The process ID of the calling process
C. The process ID of the parent process
D. The process ID of the sibling process

mcqs.explanation: The wait3() function returns the process ID of the terminated child process.

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the options parameter in the wait3() function?

options.text: A. To specify additional behavior
B. To specify the child process to wait for
C. To specify the parent process to wait for
D. To specify the sibling process to wait for

mcqs.explanation: The options parameter in the wait3() function can be used to specify additional behavior.

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the rusage parameter in the wait3() function?

options.text: A. To specify the child process to wait for
B. To specify the parent process to wait for
C. To specify the sibling process to wait for
D. To specify the resource usage information

mcqs.explanation: The rusage parameter in the wait3() function can be used to specify the resource usage information.

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the status parameter in the wait3() function?

options.text: A. To specify the child process to wait for
B. To specify the parent process to wait for
C. To specify the sibling process to wait for
D. To specify the exit status of the child process

mcqs.explanation: The status parameter in the wait3() function can be used to specify the exit status of the child process.
